nodes.label: Block-Based Modular Architecture
nodes.rationale: Chosen to allow adding new event types by composing existing blocks without changing core system; each invitation is a collection of configured blocks via JSONB data, not hardcoded.

nodes.label: Multi-tenant by Event Type
nodes.rationale: Supports multiple event types (wedding, birthday, etc.) within a single platform using shared blocks.

nodes.label: JSONB Config Modularity
nodes.rationale: JSONB column on invitation_blocks stores per-block configuration; each block_type has its own Zod-validated schema, so new blocks do not require table structure changes.

nodes.label: Wildcard Subdomain Deployment
nodes.rationale: Each invitation gets a unique subdomain (slug.salarasa.id) for easy sharing; SSR renders invitation pages dynamically from block data so content updates are instant without redeploy.

nodes.label: SSR Dynamic Rendering
nodes.rationale: Invitation pages are rendered server-side from block data rather than static builds, enabling instant content updates without redeployment.

nodes.label: TanStack Intent System
nodes.rationale: Agent skill system that maps intent IDs to npx load commands for TanStack ecosystem packages and patterns.

nodes.label: Multi-tenant Subdomain Architecture
nodes.rationale: Each invitation is served via a unique subdomain using a wildcard DNS record and Nginx reverse proxy to the NodeJS app.

nodes.label: File-Based Routing
nodes.rationale: Routes are managed as files in src/routes; TanStack automatically generates route content.

nodes.label: TanStack CTA Project Configuration
nodes.rationale: Project created with TanStack CTA using file-router mode, React, TypeScript, Tailwind. Chosen add-ons: drizzle (PostgreSQL), shadcn, form, table, tanstack-query, t3env, eslint.

nodes.label: Drizzle Kit Configuration
nodes.rationale: Loads environment variables from .env.local and .env before defining drizzle-kit config for PostgreSQL schema migrations.

nodes.label: run-seed.ts Top-level Script
nodes.rationale: Loads dotenv then dynamically imports seed-admin.ts to bypass ESM hoisting.

nodes.label: run-preview.ts Top-level Script
nodes.rationale: Loads dotenv then dynamically imports seed-preview.ts.

nodes.label: createAdmin Seed Function
nodes.rationale: Creates admin account via better-auth API signUpEmail with hardcoded credentials for initial setup.

nodes.label: seedPreview Seed Function
nodes.rationale: Creates a published preview invitation with default blocks for the Riqqa Pastel Garden theme.

nodes.label: main Seed Theme Function
nodes.rationale: Seeds the Riqqa Pastel Garden theme into the themes table using upsert (onConflictDoNothing).

nodes.label: Database Client Instance
nodes.rationale: Server-only drizzle ORM client initialized with DATABASE_URL and full schema object.

nodes.label: user Table Schema
nodes.rationale: Auth table managed by better-auth. Do not rename. Generated by CLI.

nodes.label: session Table Schema
nodes.rationale: Auth table managed by better-auth.

nodes.label: account Table Schema
nodes.rationale: Auth table managed by better-auth. Stores OAuth provider credentials.

nodes.label: verification Table Schema
nodes.rationale: Auth table managed by better-auth. Used for email verification tokens.

nodes.label: invitation_blocks Table Schema
nodes.rationale: Block config validated in app layer, stored as JSONB.

nodes.label: T3 Env Configuration
nodes.rationale: Validates DATABASE_URL, BETTER_AUTH_SECRET, APP_BASE_DOMAIN, NODE_ENV server-side and VITE_APP_TITLE client-side using Zod.

nodes.label: Better-Auth Client Instance
nodes.rationale: BaseURL must match .env.local configuration.

nodes.label: Better-Auth Server Configuration
nodes.rationale: Uses drizzleAdapter with pg provider. Configured for development: useSecureCookies=false, trustedOrigins include localhost. Session expires in 30 days. Email/password auth enabled without verification.

nodes.label: DEFAULT_BLOCKS Array
nodes.rationale: Default block configurations following Riqqa replica structure. Each block has a Zod-validated config parsed from schema defaults.

nodes.label: defaultBlocksForNewInvitation Factory
nodes.rationale: Maps DEFAULT_BLOCKS to insertable format with orderIndex and isActive flags.

nodes.label: BlockSection
nodes.rationale: Shared wrapper used by every block. Renders the section container with Riqqa-themed background + center-aligned content, mobile-first.
